info.description: Subfinder is a subdomain discovery tool that discovers subdomains for websites by using passive online sources.

commands.name: subfinder
commands.description: Subfinder is a subdomain discovery tool that discovers subdomains for websites by using passive online sources.

parameters.name: Target Domain
parameters.description: Domains to find subdomains for

parameters.name: Sources
parameters.description: Specific sources to use for discovery (-s crtsh,github). Use -ls to display all available sources.

parameters.name: Recursive
parameters.description: Use only sources that can handle subdomains recursively rather than both recursive and non-recursive sources

parameters.name: Target Domains List
parameters.description: File containing list of domains for subdomain discovery

parameters.name: Output Directory
parameters.description: Directory to write output (-dL only)

parameters.name: Report Statistics
parameters.description: Report source statistics

parameters.name: Timeout
parameters.description: Seconds to wait before timing out (default 30)

parameters.name: Resolvers File
parameters.description: File containing list of resolvers to use

parameters.name: Update
parameters.description: Update subfinder to latest version

parameters.name: Version
parameters.description: Show version of subfinder

parameters.name: Exclude IPs
parameters.description: Exclude IPs from the list of domains

parameters.name: Proxy
parameters.description: Http proxy to use with subfinder

parameters.name: No Color
parameters.description: Disable color in output

parameters.name: Match
parameters.description: Subdomain or list of subdomain to match (file or comma separated)

parameters.name: Include IP
parameters.description: Include host IP in output (-active only)

parameters.name: Active Domains Only
parameters.description: Display active subdomains only

parameters.name: Rate Limits
parameters.description: Maximum number of http requests to send per second for providers in key=value format (-rls hackertarget=10/m)

parameters.name: Disable Update Check
parameters.description: Disable automatic subfinder update check

parameters.name: Collect Sources
parameters.description: Include all sources in the output (-json only)

parameters.name: Output File
parameters.description: File to write output to

parameters.name: Verbose Output
parameters.description: Show verbose output

parameters.name: Resolvers
parameters.description: Comma separated list of resolvers to use

parameters.name: Json
parameters.description: Write output in JSONL(ines) format

parameters.name: Configuration File
parameters.description: Subfinder config file

parameters.name: Rate Limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of http requests to send per second (global)

parameters.name: Filter
parameters.description: Subdomain or list of subdomain to filter (file or comma separated)

parameters.name: Silent
parameters.description: Show only subdomains in output

parameters.name: All Sources
parameters.description: Use all sources for enumeration (slow)

parameters.name: List Sources
parameters.description: List all available sources

parameters.name: Exclude Sources
parameters.description: Sources to exclude from enumeration (-es alienvault,zoomeyeapi)

parameters.name: Max Time
parameters.description: Minutes to wait for enumeration results (default 10)

parameters.name: Threads
parameters.description: Number of concurrent goroutines for resolving (-active only) (default 10)

parameters.name: Provider Configuration File
parameters.description: Provider config file
